caption: A man with glasses and dark hair tied back performs on a stage against a backdrop of light-colored wooden blinds. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a dark, embroidered vest featuring red and white detailing. He is singing into a black microphone and playing an acoustic guitar. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters on a black rectangular background on the right side of the scene. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar position, though his mouth moves as he sings and his hands shift slightly while playing the guitar. The camera angle and the positioning of the audience remain constant throughout the sequence.
